mentions.note: Worst S&P performer, down 68% in 2025. Programmatic advertising disrupted by AI; losing to deep-pocketed Amazon; botched AI rollout. Still searching for place in AI world. Too much uncertainty.

Advertising-tech chronic underperformer; down 68% in 2026, down another 20% YTD; CFO fired after 5 months (major red flag); valuation collapsed from 62x to 15x but confidence lacking until turnaround evident.

Chronic underperformer; down 68% in 2026 YTD already worst performer on S&P 500 last year; CFO fired after only 5 months major red flag; struggling to adapt to AI era; Wall Street fears ad-tech middlemen obsolete as Meta handles own AI targeting; down another 17% this week; now 15x forward earnings vs. 62x last year.
#6 worst January. Fired new CFO after 5 months (leadership risk). Already struggling to adapt to AI-dominated advertising landscape. Risk/reward poor.
Insiders buying $150M; growing 22%. Heavy Amazon competition. Cramer: willing to 'bless' $22 as low entry but wait couple quarters for proof of momentum before committing.
